examples: In front of half a million people, she made her first public address, mixing Buddhist values with Gandhian principles of nonviolent resistance.
Over the decades a Gandhian fondness for - some say idealization of - rural life has also kept people in villages, where the bonds of caste and custom remain strong.
So now there are the Gandhian fasts, the labor strife, the laments from industrialists.
The newly confident middle class have gleefully abandoned Gandhian austerity for hearty consumerism, splurging on goods and services.
People who go there are drawn into a Gandhian spirit of camaraderie and hope for a new kind of future.
